title: Bio et non labour, est-ce possible ?
subtitle: ESSAI SYSTEME PLURI-ANNUEL Synthèse de 3 années 2019 à 2021
description: A three-year experimental synthesis evaluating the feasibility of organic no-till versus conventional tillage in pluri-annual crop rotations. The study assesses soil structure, biodiversity, weed dynamics, carbon balance, and economic performance on a Normandy farm.
